title: Cobblemon Altered Realms
description: Cobblemon: Altered Realms expands the Cobblemon experience with Fakémon and beyond, bringing new creatures, worlds, and adventures to discover.
body:
# **🌌 Cobblemon: Altered Realms**
_Step into a world where reality has shifted..._

In Cobblemon: Altered Realms, the familiar journey of Cobblemon expands into untold dimensions, bringing Fakémon and other mods into your adventure. Discover new species, encounter strange evolutions, and explore biomes brimming with mystery.

## **✨ Features**

**Fakémon Integration** – Adds custom-made Pokémon-like creatures that blend seamlessly with Cobblemon.

**Expanded Exploration** – Traverse lush forests, and altered landscapes powered by world-enhancing mods.

**Immersive Atmosphere** – Enhanced visuals, sounds, and RPG-inspired systems to make your journey feel like a true Pokémon adventure.

**Endless Adventure** – Catch, train, and build teams with both classic Cobblemon species and brand-new Fakémon.

**Interactive Quest System** – Complete challenging quests for Safari exploration, Dungeon delving, and region-based Pokédex completion.

**Dynamic Reward System** – Earn exclusive Pokémon from multiple reward pools including Random GG&T, Mixed Dimensions, Storybook Hybrids, and more.

**Advanced Gacha System** – Test your luck with our enhanced gacha featuring:
- "Nice Try" system for additional opportunities
- Pity System that guarantees a selected Pokémon after 10 pulls
- Never lose progress toward your guaranteed pull!

**Radical Red Integration** – Selected Fakemons now integrated into Radical Red Series trainers for enhanced difficulty and unique encounters.

**Multiple Currency System** – Trade with distinct currencies:
- **Void Shard** – Obtain rare and special Pokémon
- **Bloom Petal** – Purchase Starter Pokémon
- **Chrono Piece** – Reserved for future Technical Machine acquisitions
- **Void Dust** – Purpose to be determined (suggestions welcome!)

## **🎮 The Experience**

Whether you're a trainer seeking rare Fakémon, a builder creating your dream town, a quest hunter completing dynamic objectives, or an adventurer exploring the farthest reaches of the altered realms, this modpack offers a unique twist on the Cobblemon experience.

_Your journey begins here. Which Fakémon will you discover first?_

## **⚠️ Troubleshooting**

Experiencing block regeneration or lag issues?

Try removing these mods: Perception, Particular, AmbientSounds, and CreativeCore. Then install [Cobblemon Optimizer](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemonoptimizer) as a replacement for better performance optimization.

Minimum Requirements: 8-10GB RAM allocated for optimal gameplay experience.

<details>
<summary>Required FTB Mods</summary>

Make sure the following FTB mods are installed:
- FTB Quests
- FTB Library
- FTB Teams
- FTB Filter
- FTB xMod
- Suren FTB Quest Resource Pack (for better FTB quest textures)

</details>
